title: Add AnalysisOpportunity and AnalysisHandoff types
description: Define decision modes, score breakdown, field coverage, source recommendations, warnings, and lineage metadata shared by Research and Data Lab.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: research-analytics-handoff / Evaluate Research run analysis opportunity; Persist analysis opportunity; Preserve handoff lineage.
review_initial_requirements: Types expose report_only/light_analysis/full_analysis/continue_crawl and field/source/lineage structures.
review_regression_requirements: Existing Research run and analytics dataset types remain compatible.
notes: completed:新增 AnalysisOpportunity/AnalysisHandoff 类型；同时提交本 change 的 plan、OpenSpec artifacts 和 issues CSV 基线。validation:types_only

title: Persist opportunities and handoffs
description: Add create/read/update/lazy-load helpers for analysis opportunities and handoffs keyed by research run id.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Persist analysis opportunity; Preserve handoff lineage.
review_initial_requirements: Opportunity can be fetched after creation and old runs can lazily generate or return clear next action.
review_regression_requirements: Existing research store schema initialization remains idempotent.
notes: completed:新增 analysis_opportunities/analysis_handoffs schema 与 get/upsert helper。validation:npm run lint passed

title: Implement deterministic opportunity scoring
description: Score Research documents, tables, assets, candidates, frontier, providers, source profiles, reports, and topic terms without requiring LLM.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Evaluate Research run analysis opportunity / Market topic produces analyzable opportunity; Tool comparison avoids forced full analysis.
review_initial_requirements: Market-heavy topics produce full/continue-crawl recommendations with feature/missing-field evidence.
review_regression_requirements: Tool/product-comparison topics do not default to full analysis.

title: Add optional LLM topic expansion
description: Use configured LLM for task type, candidate features, missing fields, recommended sources, and explanation while preserving deterministic fallback.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: analytics-topic-planning / Use deterministic analytics for computed results; research-analytics-handoff / Evaluate Research run analysis opportunity.
review_initial_requirements: LLM failure still returns deterministic low/medium confidence opportunity.
review_regression_requirements: No numeric statistics or chart values are generated by LLM.

title: Add analysis-opportunity routes
description: Expose POST/GET /api/research/runs/:runId/analysis-opportunity and ensure generation is read-only.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Evaluate Research run analysis opportunity; Persist analysis opportunity; Opportunity generation has no analytics side effects.
review_initial_requirements: POST/GET return full opportunity payload and no analytics dataset/job is created.
review_regression_requirements: Existing run detail, report, evidence, graph, and search endpoints still work.

title: Implement analysis-handoff route
description: Add POST /api/research/runs/:runId/analysis-handoff supporting report_only, light_analysis, full_analysis, and continue_crawl.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Handoff decision controls side effects; Preserve handoff lineage.
review_initial_requirements: Every decision returns handoff_id, decision, target_page, datasets/plans if created, next_actions, and warnings.
review_regression_requirements: Invalid decisions return clear 400 without side effects.

title: Implement report-only handoff
description: Record report_only decision without creating analytics datasets or worker jobs.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Report-only decision; Report-only mode.
review_initial_requirements: Dataset/job counts do not increase after report_only.
review_regression_requirements: Existing direct export route is unaffected.

title: Implement lightweight handoff
description: Create/reuse Research source registry or lightweight dataset and record allowed operations profile/stats/basic charts.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Lightweight analysis decision; Lightweight mode; Light mode restricts heavy actions.
test_mcp: npm run test:research; npm run test:analytics
review_initial_requirements: Light handoff creates usable context and allowed operation metadata.
review_regression_requirements: Regression/cluster/deep learning remain disabled by default.

title: Implement full-analysis handoff
description: Create/reuse source registry and create topic/plan metadata for Data Lab wizard entry.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Full analysis decision; Full mode; Preserve handoff lineage.
test_mcp: npm run test:research; npm run test:analytics
review_initial_requirements: Full handoff returns Data Lab wizard target, dataset/source registry context, and plan metadata.
review_regression_requirements: Existing data-source export route still returns same shape.

title: Implement continue-crawl handoff
description: Generate follow-up planned queries from missing fields and recommended data sources while preserving run lineage.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Continue crawling decision.
review_initial_requirements: Continue-crawl adds planned queries and returns Research discovery next action.
review_regression_requirements: Cancelled runs and invalid states return safe errors.

phase: 3. Analytics Planning and Data Lab Backend
title: Add analytics planner service
description: Produce questions, variable roles, methods, charts, field coverage, risks, and next actions from opportunity + profile + registry rows.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Generate topic-driven analysis plan; Plan includes questions and variables; Plan explains missing fields.
review_initial_requirements: Planner returns structured plan for market topic and safe report/light plan for tool comparison.
review_regression_requirements: Planner does not execute worker jobs.

phase: 3. Analytics Planning and Data Lab Backend
title: Add Data Lab handoff/plan APIs
description: Support loading handoff context and generating analysis plan from handoff or topic.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Generate topic-driven analysis plan; Show context-rich Data Lab landing state.
review_initial_requirements: API returns handoff context and generated plan with field coverage.
review_regression_requirements: Existing dataset/profile/analyze APIs remain compatible.

phase: 3. Analytics Planning and Data Lab Backend
title: Enforce lightweight restrictions
description: Prevent lightweight mode from automatically running regression, clustering, deep learning, heavy exports, or unsupported methods.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Distinguish report, lightweight, and full analysis modes; Lightweight mode.
review_initial_requirements: Lightweight mode allows only profile, stats, frequency/crosstab, and basic charts.
review_regression_requirements: Manual full mode still supports existing worker commands.

phase: 3. Analytics Planning and Data Lab Backend
title: Preserve handoff lineage in analytics assets
description: Add handoff/run/source lineage to datasets, plans, jobs, and artifacts created from handoff.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Preserve analysis reproducibility; Preserve handoff lineage.
review_initial_requirements: Created artifacts include dataset id, source lineage, field mapping, analysis kind, and generated parameters.
review_regression_requirements: Existing artifacts without handoff metadata still render.

title: Add AnalysisDecisionPanel
description: Show topic type, score, candidate features, data assets, recommendation, and actions on completed Research run results.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Show Research decision card; Decision card visible.
review_initial_requirements: Decision card appears only when run has opportunity/report/evidence context.
review_regression_requirements: Existing Research pages still render when no opportunity exists.

title: Add AnalysisOpportunityDrawer
description: Show score breakdown, evidence URLs, available/missing fields, source recommendations, and warnings.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Show Research decision card; Expose handoff actions in UI.
review_initial_requirements: Drawer opens from decision card and displays persisted opportunity details.
review_regression_requirements: Drawer handles missing evidence gracefully.

title: Wire Research handoff actions
description: Connect report-only/light/full/continue-crawl actions with loading, success, and error states.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Expose handoff actions in the UI; Keep button states observable.
review_initial_requirements: Each action calls handoff API and prevents duplicate submissions.
review_regression_requirements: Failures show actionable error category.

title: Open Data Lab with handoff context
description: Update Data Lab focus/context handling to open sources or wizard with topic, run id, report id, mode, features, missing fields, and source registry.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Show context-rich Data Lab landing state; Data Lab opens from Research handoff.
review_initial_requirements: Data Lab opens correct page and shows handoff context panel.
review_regression_requirements: Existing focus by runId/datasetId still works.

title: Show planning context in Data Lab wizard
description: Display field coverage, recommended methods, recommended charts, risks, and lightweight-mode restrictions.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: Show context-rich Data Lab landing state; Light mode restricts heavy actions.
review_initial_requirements: Wizard explains recommended plan and disabled heavy actions in light mode.
review_regression_requirements: Wizard remains usable for manual datasets.

title: Add Research backend tests
description: Cover market full-analysis recommendation, tool comparison report/light recommendation, no-side-effect opportunity generation, and all handoff decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: research-analytics-handoff scenarios.
review_initial_requirements: Tests verify routes, scorer thresholds, side effects, and decisions.
review_regression_requirements: Existing research tests still pass.

title: Add Analytics backend tests
description: Cover handoff metadata, lightweight restrictions, source registry reuse, plan generation, and lineage preservation.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: analytics-topic-planning scenarios.
review_initial_requirements: Tests verify planner output and mode restrictions.
review_regression_requirements: Existing analytics tests still pass.

title: Add UI smoke assertions
description: Assert Research decision panel source and Data Lab handoff context are present in frontend code or component tests.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: data-lab-workflow-ui scenarios.
review_initial_requirements: Smoke assertions verify decision UI and handoff context strings/props.
review_regression_requirements: Build remains green.

title: Run full validation suite
description: Run research tests, analytics tests, build, and Playwright/manual scenarios or record limited validation reasons.
acceptance_criteria: Specs: all capability scenarios.
test_mcp: npm run test:research; npm run test:analytics; npm run build
review_initial_requirements: Validation results are recorded in CSV notes and failures are fixed or marked blocked.
review_regression_requirements: No unrelated runtime DB files are committed.
